name: Portuguese Eggs with Peas
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
4 slices garlic-seasoned pork sausage, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy 10-inch skillet, melt the butter over moderate heat.
2. When the foam has almost subsided, add the onions and stir frequently until golden, about 8-10 minutes.
3. Stir in the stock, peas, parsley, coriander, sugar, salt, pepper, and sausage slices around the edge of the pan.
4. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to low and cover with a lid.
5. Simmer for 5 minutes.
6. Gently break each egg into the skillet, keeping them well apart.
7. Sprinkle the eggs lightly with salt and pepper.
8. Cover and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes until the whites are set.
9. Serve immediately.
